title: Stage A classify (warm classifier prompt + response parser) → pure-code resolve (exceptions → cell → inheritance → default → role → profile roleMap → target)

tests.summary: 22 passed — classify: buildClassifierPrompt lists every task type/tier(+def)/exception + the task + asks JSON, truncates long tasks; parseClassification handles clean JSON / JSON-in-prose / fenced ```json / valid+unknown matchedException / out-of-vocab clamp (taskType→other, tier→T1) / null on no-JSON; classify→resolve composes. resolve: exception→role, cell→role, row-default, column-default, global-default (resolve-ok). rolemap: same classification, different profile, different target, same matrix (rolemap-ok). Full suite 534 passed / 9 skipped / 0 failed (one first-run vault-heal env-flake from the live probe's claude child; clean on rerun).

classifyProbe.summary: classify-ok — 3 fixtures through ONE pinned warm haiku session (real buildClassifierPrompt + parseClassification): 'fix the failing login unit test'→code/T1-standard (17.1s); 'survey recent papers on RAG'→research/T1-standard (14.9s); 'rename foo to bar in utils.ts'→code/T0-trivial (8.1s). All valid {taskType,tier}.

build.summary: unchanged since MR1b — classifier additions are in the .mjs core + scripts/tests, not the Next bundle

e2e.summary: N/A — Stage A is classifier (live probe) + pure resolver (vitest); the gateway wiring of Stage A→B lands with MR1d/MR1e + MR2 view simulator.

video.note: Backend slice; MR-wave consolidated walkthrough filmed at MR2.

notes: Stage A = warm-classifier (the LLM only classifies) + pure-code resolution (deterministic). buildClassifierPrompt/parseClassification added to routing-core.mjs (single source of truth, also drives the MR2 simulator — 'the simulator IS Stage A'). The resolver (resolveRole/resolveRoute) shipped + was unit-tested in MR1a; its resolve-ok/rolemap-ok coverage lives in tests/routing-compiler.test.ts. parseClassification clamps out-of-vocabulary values to safe defaults (LLM near-misses) and returns null only on total JSON failure (gateway then routes the `default` role). The live classify-ok probe (scripts/probe-classify.mjs) is committed + re-runnable. DEFERRED to MR1e: persisting each Stage-A decision to decisions.jsonl at resolution time (the gateway is the writer); the classifier prompt/parse + resolver are the load-bearing pure pieces and are done here. Satisfies brief §3 tokens classify-ok, resolve-ok, rolemap-ok.
